# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

const DEFAULT_MODULES = (Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES") ?? "")
  .split(",")
  .map((s) => s.trim())
  .filter(Boolean);

type LoadedModule = {
  specifier: string;
  ok: boolean;
  exports?: string[];
  error?: string;
};

function json(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) {
    headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  }
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), {
    ...init,
    headers,
  });
}

function text(data: string, init: ResponseInit = {}) {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) {
    headers.set("content-type", "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  }
  return new Response(data, {
    ...init,
    headers,
  });
}

function parseModuleSpecifiers(req: Request): string[] {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  const fromQuery = [
    ...url.searchParams.getAll("module"),
    ...url.searchParams.getAll("modules").flatMap((v) => v.split(",")),
  ]
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);

  return fromQuery.length > 0 ? fromQuery : DEFAULT_MODULES;
}

function validateSpecifier(specifier: string): { ok: true } | { ok: false; error: string } {
  try {
    const url = new URL(specifier);
    if (!["https:", "http:"].includes(url.protocol)) {
      return { ok: false, error: `unsupported protocol: ${url.protocol}` };
    }
    return { ok: true };
  } catch {
    if (
      specifier.startsWith("./") ||
      specifier.startsWith("../") ||
      specifier.startsWith("/") ||
      specifier.startsWith("file:")
    ) {
      return { ok: false, error: "local module specifiers are not allowed" };
    }
    return { ok: false, error: "module specifier must be an absolute http(s) URL" };
  }
}

async function loadModule(specifier: string): Promise<LoadedModule> {
  const validation = validateSpecifier(specifier);
  if (!validation.ok) {
    return {
      specifier,
      ok: false,
      error: validation.error,
    };
  }

  try {
    const mod = await import(specifier);
    return {
      specifier,
      ok: true,
      exports: Object.keys(mod).sort(),
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return {
      specifier,
      ok: false,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
    };
  }
}

function pluginRunnerAvailable(mod: unknown): mod is { run: (req: Request) => unknown | Promise<unknown> } {
  return typeof mod === "object" && mod !== null && typeof (mod as { run?: unknown }).run === "function";
}

async function maybeRunPlugins(req: Request, specifiers: string[]) {
  const results: Array<{ specifier: string; ok: boolean; result?: unknown; error?: string }> = [];

  for (const specifier of specifiers) {
    const validation = validateSpecifier(specifier);
    if (!validation.ok) {
      results.push({ specifier, ok: false, error: validation.error });
      continue;
    }

    try {
      const mod = await import(specifier);
      if (!pluginRunnerAvailable(mod)) {
        results.push({ specifier, ok: false, error: 'module does not export a "run(req)" function' });
        continue;
      }
      const result = await mod.run(req);
      results.push({ specifier, ok: true, result });
    } catch (error) {
      results.push({
        specifier,
        ok: false,
        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      });
    }
  }

  return results;
}

Deno.serve(async (req) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/") {
    return json({
      name: "deno-deploy-dynamic-plugin-loader",
      usage: {
        inspect: "/inspect?module=https://example.com/mod.ts",
        run: "/run?module=https://example.com/plugin.ts",
      },
      defaultModulesFromEnv: DEFAULT_MODULES,
    });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/inspect") {
    const specifiers = parseModuleSpecifiers(req);
    if (specifiers.length === 0) {
      return json(
        {
          error: "no modules provided",
          hint: 'set PLUGIN_MODULES env var or pass ?module=https://... or ?modules=a,b',
        },
        { status: 400 },
      );
    }

    const loaded = await Promise.all(specifiers.map(loadModule));
    return json({
      count: loaded.length,
      modules: loaded,
    });
  }

  if (url.pathname === "/run") {
    const specifiers = parseModuleSpecifiers(req);
    if (specifiers.length === 0) {
      return json(
        {
          error: "no modules provided",
          hint: 'set PLUGIN_MODULES env var or pass ?module=https://... or ?modules=a,b',
        },
        { status: 400 },
      );
    }

    const results = await maybeRunPlugins(req, specifiers);
    return json({
      count: results.length,
      results,
    });
  }

  return text("Not Found", { status: 404 });
});
